description: Formal GMAT/Orekit numerical comparison has not been executed.
rationale: Scenario exports exist; independent tool execution requires external setup and review.

description: Moon UHF geometry uses Moon-center range and Earth occultation screening, not a lunar surface relay asset.
rationale: Adequate for preliminary RF sizing; limitations documented.

description: Thermal model is lumped-parameter, not finite-element thermal analysis.
rationale: Assignment-level preliminary thermal trends and limits are covered.

description: ADCS wheel momentum is preliminary bookkeeping, not closed-loop wheel sizing.
rationale: Full Euler dynamics and disturbance torques are modeled; hardware sizing remains future work.

description: No independent IV&V or authority acceptance has been performed.
rationale: Cannot be completed by the development agent; requires independent organization/authority.
